form.formComment: Third race start today. At debut, sat on the speed throughout before fading 8th of 13 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on February 14 over 1000m, 3.5 len behind Lonstar carrying 59kg at $10. Last start 9th of 11 at Kilmore Mdn-Sw on March 6 over 1100m, 4.5 len behind Prince Pienza with 59kg at $11. Safely held again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Third race start today. form.formComment: Gelding by Deep Field facing the starter for the first time. Finished seventh in a Cranbourne jump-out on March 16. Former Kiwi fitter for two jump-outs in Australia and worth keeping safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Deep Field facing the starter for the first time. Finished seventh in a Cranbourne jump-out on March 16. Former Kiwi fitter for two jump-outs in Australia and worth keeping safe.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At long odds at debut, 7th of 9 at Geelong 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 14 over 1212m, 4.5 len behind Wild Roses Grow carrying 58kg at $41. Second-up 8th of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1300m, 10 len behind Abby's Crossword carrying 59kg at $17. Has ability and can get off the mark this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4.5). Raced two times to date. Second-up 8th of 10 at Avoca Mdn-Sw on March 29 over 1300m, 10 len behind Abby's Crossword carrying 59kg at $17. Has ability and can get off the mark this time.

form.formComment: Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 5th of 8 at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 28 over 1208m, slow going 4.5 len behind Bluey Merchant with 58kg at $15. The run before that set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 8 at Mt Gambier 2yo+ Mdn-Sw on March 13 over 1211m, 1.1 len behind Drumlargen carrying 57kg at $15. Needs to do more. Not keen on his chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Not keen on his chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up eased back early on 3rd in a small field at Sale Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 1012m, on heavy track; 2.25 len behind Paris Winds carrying 57kg at $6.50. Second-up 6th of 9 at Yarra Valley Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1200m, slow going 2 len behind Benriach carrying 59kg at $2.10. Blinkers added and can improve sharply.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Third-up today. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running from the 400m until approaching the 200m.

form.formComment: Was well-supported at debut, gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 8 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1235m, nose behind Fiveminutewarning carrying 59kg at $2.50. Led and just missed on debut and can go one better.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Was well-supported at debut, gave a sight but was run down late 2nd of 8 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on March 22 over 1235m, nose behind Fiveminutewarning carrying 59kg at $2.50. Led and just missed on debut and can go one better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid outwards under pressure over the final 200m.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of four months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign seventh of 12 at Ballarat Cl3-Sw December 6 over 1400m, soft track; 2.25 len behind Shystar with 55.5kg at $31. When resuming last campaign third of 8 at Bendigo Mdn-Sw October 29 over 1000m, 2 len behind Cavern carrying 58kg at $31. Placed two of three for the new yard and can return with a strong run.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last campaign seventh of 12 at Gundagai Super Mdn November 14 over 1180m, 6 len behind Showtime Kistena with 55.5kg at $19. On debut fourth of 12 at Albury Mdn-Sw October 11 over 1175m, 2 len behind Justenuffsplash carrying 55.5kg at $8. Expecting a strong run fresh.

form.formComment: At debut, sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 11 at Echuca Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1209m, 1.3 len behind Western Lane with 57kg at $10. Well-placed to get off the mark.

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, ran last of 11 at Echuca Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1209m, 13 len behind Western Lane with 57kg at $41. Others look better prospects.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Jumped at long odds at debut, ran last of 11 at Echuca Mdn-Sw on March 21 over 1209m, 13 len behind Western Lane with 57kg at $41. Others look better prospects.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly (North Pacific - Sizzling Belle). She has three recent trials prior to her debut today. Fitter for a jump-out on March 24 at Pakenham when finished fourth. Importantly has a nice gate so worth keeping safe.
